overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person driving from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates urban streets with active windshield wipers, makes a right turn at an intersection, and stops at a traffic light before proceeding through the green light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with construction barriers

events.description: passing a blue truck in the left lane
approaching slower traffic ahead on the wet road

agents.ego_description: driving straight on the rain-soaked urban road with windshield wipers active, maintaining steady speed alongside other traffic

notable_agents.action: blue truck driving parallel in the left lane
white car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: white and red striped plastic construction barriers lining the right side of the road
green leafy trees forming a canopy over the left side of the street
interior dashboard of the bus with steering wheel, gauges, and GPS screen visible

segments.scene_description: The bus drives straight along a rain-soaked urban arterial road lined with construction barriers on the right and trees on the left. The windshield wipers sweep continuously as the bus passes a blue truck and approaches other vehicles ahead. The interior dashboard with its controls and GPS display frames the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with modern commercial buildings

events.description: bus initiates right turn at the intersection
completes turn onto street with modern glass buildings visible on the right

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection while checking side mirrors, then accelerating along the new street

notable_agents.action: black car passing through the intersection from the left

entered.detail: large modern commercial building with reflective glass facade and multiple stories
yellow directional road signs with black arrows suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus makes a right turn at an urban intersection, transitioning from the tree-lined street to a commercial area with modern glass buildings. Yellow overhead directional signs mark the intersection as the bus completes the turn and continues driving through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street stopped at traffic signal

events.description: bus comes to a complete stop behind a line of vehicles at the red traffic light
pedestrian with umbrella crosses the street from right to left in front of the stopped traffic

agents.ego_description: stopped at a red traffic light behind other vehicles, waiting for the signal to change while rain continues to fall

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella crossing the street from right to left in front of the bus
silver sedan stopped directly ahead with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: line of cars stopped at the traffic light including a silver sedan and blue car with brake lights on
traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red light

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at a red traffic light behind a line of vehicles on the rain-slicked street. A modern glass building looms on the right side closer to the bus. A pedestrian with an umbrella crosses in front of the stopped traffic while the windshield wipers continue to clear the heavy rain from the glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crossing with construction zone

events.description: traffic light changes to green and bus begins accelerating forward
bus accelerates through the intersection following the vehicle ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light and driving through the wide intersection, continuing on the wet road past the traffic signal

notable_agents.action: silver sedan accelerating through the intersection ahead of the bus

entered.detail: white and red striped construction barriers reappearing on the left side of the road after the intersection
wide intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic signal infrastructure

segments.scene_description: The traffic light turns green and the bus accelerates forward through the wide intersection, following the silver sedan ahead. The modern glass building falls behind as the bus passes through the crossing, and construction barriers reappear on the left side of the road. The bus continues driving through the persistent rain with wipers active.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-soaked urban corridor, transitioning from a tree-lined arterial road to a modern commercial district. It begins by driving straight past construction barriers and a blue truck, with the dashboard and active windshield wipers framing the view of the heavy rain. As the bus makes a right turn at an intersection marked by yellow overhead signs, the scenery shifts from greenery to a landscape of sleek glass buildings. The camera then comes to a halt behind a line of vehicles at a red light, pausing as a pedestrian with an umbrella crosses the slick pavement. Finally, the light turns green and the bus accelerates forward, leaving the glass architecture behind as construction barriers reappear on the left side of the road.
